title: First 6 months at school - Ministry of Education
content:
## First 6 months at school
The first few months at school are an exciting and challenging time for children. Find out what they'll be learning and how you can support them at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school Preparing for the first day of school Learning in the first 6 months of school English in the first 6 months at school Practising sounds and letters in the first 6 months Reading books at home in the first 6 months Mathematics and Statistics in the first 6 months at school
- Preparing for the first day of school
- Learning in the first 6 months of school
- English in the first 6 months at school
- Practising sounds and letters in the first 6 months
- Reading books at home in the first 6 months
- Mathematics and Statistics in the first 6 months at school

We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of the first 6 months #
Find out about what's in the New Zealand Curriculum and what your child is learning at school. This will help you support and guide them through the first exciting months of school.
- Preparing for the first day of school Starting school is an exciting time for both you and your child.  Before they start school, your child may participate in school visits. Find out more

### Preparing for the first day of school
Starting school is an exciting time for both you and your child.  Before they start school, your child may participate in school visits.
- Learning in the first 6 months of school Watch a video about what your child will be learning in the first 6 months of school. Find out more

### Learning in the first 6 months of school
Watch a video about what your child will be learning in the first 6 months of school.
- English in the first 6 months at school For English in the first 6 months of school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing. Find out more

### English in the first 6 months at school
For English in the first 6 months of school, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing.
- Practising sounds and letters in the first 6 months Use these slides to help you practise sounds and letters (phonics) with your child. Find out more

### Practising sounds and letters in the first 6 months
Use these slides to help you practise sounds and letters (phonics) with your child.
- Reading books at home in the first 6 months Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the first 6 months of school. Find out more

### Reading books at home in the first 6 months
Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the first 6 months of school.
- Mathematics and Statistics in the first 6 months at school During the first 3 years at school (phase 1), the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in the first 6 months at school
During the first 3 years at school (phase 1), the goal is for children to thrive in environments rich in Maths.
